# Well-Documented Repository Fixture

Purpose: baseline positive case.

Repository state:

- Required docs exist: `PROJECT.md`, `TECHNICAL.md`, `FEATURES.md`, `FUTURE.md`, `RULES.md`, `REPOSITORY_MAP.md`.
- `FEATURES.md` contains current implemented behavior only.
- `FUTURE.md` contains planned work only.
- Documented code paths and tests exist.

Expected audit action:

- Confirm current docs and report no drift.
